name: paopao
description: paopao: generate editable consulting-style PPTX decks from PDFs, reports, papers, and reference materials.

interface.shortDescription: Turn source documents into editable consulting-style PPTX decks.
interface.longDescription: paopao helps turn source documents into polished, editable PowerPoint decks. Free edition includes 7 layout templates and up to 15 slides per deck. Full template library (90+ layouts) available via WeChat: sugarong_
interface.defaultPrompt: Use paopao to turn this document into an editable PPTX deck.
